---
title: "Coverage"
page-layout: full
---

## Coverage resources

- [Published coverage summary](coverage/index.html)
- [Interactive line-by-line report](coverage/report.html)
- [Codecov project](https://codecov.io/gh/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD)
- [Coverage map (by feature area)](developers/coverage-map.qmd)

The tracked coverage artifacts live in `covr/assets/` and are mirrored to `docs/coverage/` for the published site.
Coverage is generated locally and checked in. GitHub Actions uploads the committed `covr/assets/cobertura.xml` report to Codecov on each push and exits successfully when no valid report is present.

## Related developer pages

- [Developers hub](developers/index.qmd)
- [Testing](developers/testing.qmd)
- [Coverage map](developers/coverage-map.qmd)
- [Tools](developers/tools.qmd)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Spec And Contracts](developers/spec-and-contracts.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
